wins_analysis: No wins today. The single INFY SELL setup did not execute as price never reached the entry level of ₹1,062.00 during the session, leaving the order pending at close.
losses_analysis: No losses today either. The lack of execution indicates the entry price was set too far from the prevailing market price. With only 1 setup found across all 50 stocks, the scanner's filtering criteria may be overly restrictive, causing missed opportunities in a favorable trending_down regime.
regime_impact: The trending_down regime (ADX 25, Nifty -0.7%) was favorable for supply zone shorts, but the system failed to capitalize on it. Only 1 setup was generated despite a strong directional environment — the regime should have produced more actionable supply zone candidates. The conservative zone score threshold likely filtered out viable setups that would have benefited from trend alignment.

improvements.action: Lower min_zone_score from current threshold (appears ~55+) to 48 specifically when regime is trending_down with ADX >= 23, since trend alignment compensates for slightly weaker zone structure
improvements.reason: Only 1 setup found in a favorable trending_down regime. INFY had zone score 53 which barely passed — many potentially profitable supply zones were likely filtered out at scores 45-52

improvements.action: Set entry price closer to current market price (within 0.3% of last close) rather than at the exact zone boundary when the trend strongly favors the direction. Use limit orders at zone proximity rather than deep inside the zone.
improvements.reason: INFY entry at ₹1,062 never triggered — price likely stayed below this level in a down-trending session. The entry was too aggressive for a stock already selling off.

improvements.action: Expand scan to include fresh breakdown retests and moving average rejection setups (e.g., price rejecting 20 EMA from below) alongside supply/demand zones during trending regimes
improvements.reason: Relying solely on pristine supply/demand zones yielded only 1 candidate out of 50 stocks in a clearly directional market. Additional pattern types would increase opportunity set.

improvements.action: Add intraday monitoring to convert pending orders: if price approaches within 0.2% of entry but reverses, consider a market order entry at the nearest support/resistance touch
improvements.reason: The INFY order sat pending all day without execution. An adaptive approach would have either entered on a partial zone touch or cancelled and redeployed capital elsewhere.

improvements.action: Pre-screen for stocks with highest intraday ATR relative to the distance between current price and zone entry, prioritizing setups where price is within 1 ATR of the zone
improvements.reason: INFY's zone entry at 1,062 may have been multiple ATRs away from the opening price, making execution unlikely within a single session

tomorrow_focus: If trending_down continues (watch for Nifty gap-down or continuation below today's low), aggressively scan for supply zones with price already within 0.5% of zone entry on IT and banking names showing relative weakness.

symbol_notes.INFY.NS: Supply zone at 1,062 remains untested and pristine — keep on watchlist if price rallies toward it tomorrow, but consider tighter entry if gap-up occurs near zone
symbol_notes.TCS.NS: Check for sympathy supply zones given IT sector weakness in trending_down regime — may offer additional short setups
symbol_notes.HDFCBANK.NS: Monitor for supply zone setups as banking names often lead Nifty down-moves when ADX is elevated
